feedback.text: Hello, I want to raise concerns about video games being destroyed after purchase, I have seen many games, for example: The Crew, Battlefield 1943, Star Wars: Hunters, etc. I am deeply worried that games I have purchased with my own money will be ended just like the ones mentioned. I feel like this should be adressed in the Digital Fairness Act as many people are affected by this and support the Stop Killing Games/Stop Destroying Games movements, thank you for your time.
